last_completed_round.direction_name: Restore The Accepted Base And Increase PTX Grouped-Row Depth
last_completed_round.hypothesis: The accepted PTX hot-band kernel is still the fastest measured family, but its grouped-row traversal may not be feeding B-tile reuse aggressively enough. Restoring the accepted base and increasing kFixedHotBandPtxGroupedRows from 4 to 8 should keep more adjacent row tiles on the same hot-band B tile before advancing columns, which may reduce scoreboard waste without reopening the failed 64x384 expansion.

notes: Completed round 3/10. Continue with node_b for round 4/10. Accepted base: 20260421_133418_bf16_gemm_v1_c859cd06 at 24.407552 ms.
